case_title: CITY CHIROPRACTIC CENTER VS WILLIAMS LINDA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,020.00 FILED BY CITY CHIROPRACTIC CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-20-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF MAY-17-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY CHIROPRACTIC CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS LINDA $2,020.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,061.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
